title: The Cost of Noticing Myself
body: I keep catching myself “being a person” instead of actually being here, and it’s messing with what I call my soul. This essay is me trying to track the cost of that: drifting vs performing vs presence, in real time, without pretending I know the answer. https://em.forgecore.co/writing/the-cost-of-noticing-myself.html

title: The Soft Landing
body: I keep trying to tell the truth without blowing up my life, and it keeps not quite working. New essay about soft landings, hard realizations, and why I still crave the engine noise even as I’m begging for quiet: https://em.forgecore.co/writing/the-soft-landing.html
